languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

languages.text: "Нунциус — мой дражайший коллега. Его рвение, пытливый ум и умение разносторонне взглянуть на проблему неоценимы для наших исследований. К тому же он сам весьма разговорчив".
"Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус — мой дражайший коллега. Его рвение, пытливый ум и умение разносторонне взглянуть на проблему неоценимы для наших исследований. К тому же он сам весьма разговорчив".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."
"Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."
"Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスは私の最も親しい同僚です。彼の熱意、好奇心、そして問題を様々な角度から見る能力は、私たちの研究にとって非常に貴重なものです。彼はまた、かなり話好きでもあります」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

languages.text: "Nuncius ist mein bester Kollege. Sein Eifer, seine Wissbegierigkeit und die Fähigkeit, ein Problem aus verschiedenen Blickwinkeln zu betrachten, sind für unsere Forschungen von unschätzbarem Wert. Außerdem ist er recht redselig."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ist mein bester Kollege. Sein Eifer, seine Wissbegierigkeit und die Fähigkeit, ein Problem aus verschiedenen Blickwinkeln zu betrachten, sind für unsere Forschungen von unschätzbarem Wert. Außerdem ist er recht redselig."

languages.text: «Nuncius es mi estimado colega. Su disposición, su mente inquisitiva y su facultad para ver los problemas desde distintas perspectivas resultan de un valor incalculable para nuestra investigación. También es bastante locuaz».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius es mi estimado colega. Su disposición, su mente inquisitiva y su facultad para ver los problemas desde distintas perspectivas resultan de un valor incalculable para nuestra investigación. También es bastante locuaz».

languages.text: "Nuncius benim en değerli meslektaşım. Hevesi, sorgulayıcı zihni ve bir soruna çeşitli açılardan bakabilme yeteneği; araştırmamız için paha biçilemez. Ayrıca kendisi pek gevezedir."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius benim en değerli meslektaşım. Hevesi, sorgulayıcı zihni ve bir soruna çeşitli açılardan bakabilme yeteneği; araştırmamız için paha biçilemez. Ayrıca kendisi pek gevezedir."

languages.text: « Nuncius est mon collègue le plus cher. Son enthousiasme, sa curiosité et sa capacité à aborder un problème sous différents angles sont inestimables pour nos recherches. Sans oublier qu'il est lui-même relativement loquace. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius est mon collègue le plus cher. Son enthousiasme, sa curiosité et sa capacité à aborder un problème sous différents angles sont inestimables pour nos recherches. Sans oublier qu'il est lui-même relativement loquace. »

languages.text: “努恩修斯是我最亲密的同僚。他的热忱、探究精神及多角度审视问题的能力，对我们的研究来说是无价之宝。他本人也相当健谈。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯是我最亲密的同僚。他的热忱、探究精神及多角度审视问题的能力，对我们的研究来说是无价之宝。他本人也相当健谈。”
